flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at King's College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.5k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at King's College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at King's College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.3k → $25.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at King's College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (59.4% → 51.9%).
